hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Zebra Safari Lodge-Kidepo in Karamoja, Uganda offers comfortable rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and modern amenities. Each room includes a kitchenette, tea and coffee maker, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax in the garden, terrace, or outdoor dining area. The lodge features a restaurant, bar, and coffee shop. Additional facilities include a 24-hour front desk, concierge service, and free on-site parking.
Dining Experience: A variety of breakfast options are available, including full English and Irish. The restaurant serves a range of cuisines, accommodating special diets.
Prime Location: Located in Kidepo Valley National Park, the lodge is near Taan Valley. Guests can enjoy scenic views and explore the surrounding area.
